governing_requirement: Run live Mode B health, predict and refine as draft, prove typed service-down behavior, then when eligible submit the exact original prediction to a separate independent operational-certification transaction while preserving complete certified and abstained evidence and preventing all self-promotion or descendant authority inflation.

dependency_state.disposition: MF-P6-12.04 remains dependency and live-execution blocked. In-process draft runtime, authority lattice, deterministic certificate issuer and hard-veto foundations receive partial credit.

verified_foundations: InferenceRuntime exposes health, models, predict and refine behavior under a GPU lease and validates exact label, dimension and strict-binary provider outputs.
Raw predict and refine responses remain draft_model_generated, machine_candidate and not_certified; access mode never grants authority.
The dependency-light predict node reports a clear service-unavailable hint and a complete inpaint workflow consumes predicted masks without promoting them.
Receipt and operational-authority validation enforce weakest-parent ceilings and prohibit operational certificates from impersonating training truth.
The deterministic operational issuer recomputes exact source/mask/evidence bytes, refuses draft or unqualified candidates and allows seeded hard vetoes to override unanimous critics.
Twenty-one focused runtime, authority and certification tests pass and Ruff reports no issues.

direct_probes.known_current_behavior: In-process raw success is draft-only, but it is not a signed mask_acquisition_receipt; service-domain failures are generic HTTP detail or node exceptions rather than validated mask_bridge_error records.

confirmed_gaps: MF-P6-08.08 has no governed accepted, repaired, abstained and revoked autonomous demonstration report.
MF-P6-11.03 lacks a contract-native client/service exchange with signed request/receipt/error records, preflight pins, bounded deadlines and typed service-down behavior.
MF-P6-11.07 lacks live typed retry/circuit/resource/deadline/scoped-block controls and an end-to-end no-silent-fallback fault matrix.
The Windows loopback health probe currently times out, so no live health/predict/refine transaction is proven in this audit.
Champion-backed prediction cannot be claimed until the required serving role champions are promoted and configured.
No exact original prediction has been persisted with its complete bytes/lineage and submitted to a distinct independent operational-certification transaction.

No strict slice report joins request, raw draft receipt, provider/output bytes, QA/hard-veto/critic evidence, certificate or abstention decision, revocation state, refine descendants and final authority without inflation.

implementation_packet.objective: Implement the producer-owned Mode B vertical-slice runner/evidence over adopted 08.08, 11.03 and 11.07 decisions, preserving raw draft authority and invoking certification only as a separate exact-output transaction.
implementation_packet.path_state: All five additive paths are absent and clean. They are disjoint from frozen v1 contracts, held prerequisite paths and preserved MF-P6-08.05 changes.
acceptance_criteria: Perform live loopback health/capability preflight, signed contract-native predict and refine, and typed service-down/timeout/unsupported/malformed/resource fault cases.
Persist the raw original prediction as draft-only with exact request, provider, release, capability, source, mask, transform, ownership, QA and lineage hashes.
Submit only that exact original prediction to a separate issuer transaction; the service, provider, critic, Main and refinement path cannot self-promote it.
Prove one independently certified branch and one abstained branch with complete signed evidence, current revocation state and zero hard-veto bypass.
Refinement and every derived/projected/inpaint descendant remain at or below parent authority and require their own exact wrapper for production use.
implementation_packet.next_action: Hold until MF-P6-08.08, MF-P6-11.03 and MF-P6-11.07 are implemented/adopted and exact-project worker routing is qualified; do not restart the live service or dispatch duplicate work from this acceptance audit.

claim_boundary: This audit credits in-process draft runtime, service-down messaging, authority ceilings, deterministic issuer and hard-veto unit foundations only. It does not prove a reachable live service, contract-native Mode B exchange, champion-backed prediction, exact prediction-to-certificate transaction, certified/abstained branches, complete 08.08 demonstration, or MF-P6-12.04 completion.
